# Phase-12 — LLMOps & Agentic AI

> Build, operate, and govern LLM-powered and agentic systems.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 45-49**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Large Language Model Foundations](01_Large_Language_Model_Foundations.prompt.md) | `LLM_Foundations.md` | 75 min + 4h |
| 02 | [Prompt Engineering](02_Prompt_Engineering.prompt.md) | `Prompt_Engineering.md` | 45 min + 3h |
| 03 | [Retrieval Augmented Generation](03_Retrieval_Augmented_Generation.prompt.md) | `Retrieval_Augmented_Generation.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 04 | [LLMOps](04_LLMOps.prompt.md) | `LLMOps.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 05 | [Agentic AI Architecture](05_Agentic_AI_Architecture.prompt.md) | `Agentic_AI_Architecture.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 06 | [Model Context Protocol (MCP)](06_Model_Context_Protocol_MCP.prompt.md) | `Model_Context_Protocol_MCP.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 07 | [Azure OpenAI and AI Foundry](07_Azure_OpenAI_and_AI_Foundry.prompt.md) | `Azure_OpenAI_and_AI_Foundry.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 08 | [LangChain and LlamaIndex](08_LangChain_and_LlamaIndex.prompt.md) | `LangChain_and_LlamaIndex.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 09 | [Evaluation and Guardrails](09_Evaluation_and_Guardrails.prompt.md) | `Evaluation_and_Guardrails.md` | 60 min + 3h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
